dict.string: The System requires camera access to scan and decrypt consumable items.
RPT reads your steps, workouts, heart rate, sleep, and activity data to calculate your RPG stats and award XP for real-world fitness progress.
RPT may write workout sessions to Apple Health so your activity is reflected across your health apps.
RPT tracks your outdoor patrol routes — runs, walks, and hikes — to calculate distance, pace, and award Endurance XP.
RPT uses background location to continue tracking your patrol route when you switch apps, ensuring accurate distance and pace data.
